name: Chocolate Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave chocolate and butter in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes or until melted. Stir until chocolate is completely melted.
2. Stir 1 cup sugar into the melted chocolate mixture until well blended.
3. Stir in egg and vanilla extract until completely blended.
4. Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Shape dough into 2-inch balls; roll each ball in additional sugar.
7. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. If desired, flatten the cookies with the bottom of a drinking glass before baking.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until set. Remove from cookie sheets to cool on wire racks.
Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
Prep time: 15 minutes. Chill time: 30 minutes. Baking time: 8-10 minutes.
JAM-FILLED CHOCOLATE SUGAR COOKIES:
Prepare Chocolate Sugar Cookie dough as directed. Roll the cookies in finely chopped nuts instead of sugar. Make an indentation in each ball, fill the center with your favorite jam, and bake as directed.
CHOCOLATE-CARAMEL SUGAR COOKIES:
Prepare Chocolate Sugar Cookie dough as directed. Roll the cookies in finely chopped nuts instead of sugar. Make an indentation in each ball, then bake as directed. Microwave 1 package (14 ounces) KRAFT Caramels with 2 tablespoons milk in a microwavable bowl on HIGH for 3 minutes or until melted, stirring after 2 minutes. Fill the centers of the cookies with caramel mixture and drizzle with melted BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate.
